name: Finnish Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, butter or margarine, almond extract, 1/4 cup sugar, and egg yolk. Mix with hands until well blended and the mixture holds together. If the mixture appears dry, add about 1 tablespoon of water while kneading.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll half of the dough into a 10-inch x 9-inch rectangle using a lightly floured rolling pin.
4. Brush the rolled dough with half of the egg white and sprinkle with half of the almonds and 1 tablespoon sugar.
5. Cut the dough into 15 rectangles measuring approximately 3 inches by 2 inches.
6. Place the cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet using a pancake turner.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove with a pancake turner and place on a wire rack to cool.
8. Repeat with the remaining dough.
9. Store the cookies in a tightly covered container and use within 2 weeks. Makes about 25 cookies.
